2017/2018球季意甲賽程：

常見問題：
AC米蘭同國際米蘭又係有"米蘭"，應該點分？
ANS：AC米蘭簡稱米蘭，國際米蘭叫國米，避免稱呼做AC，因為AC係球會咁解，而milan先係名既簡稱。
AC米蘭仲係咪「老人院」？
ANS：現時全隊平均年齡為25歲。
今個轉會窗到目前為止簽咗咁多球員，遲啲仲會唔會有錢買人？
ANS：其實買球員好少會一炮過畀，多數都係分期，所以仲會有錢簽其他球員。
簽咗咁多球員會唔會過唔到FFP？
ANS：早前米蘭管理層有同UEFA探討經營計劃。

Agent: ‘Cutrone renewal after Easter’

Patrick Cutrone’s agent assures “we’ll sit down with Milan” to discuss a new contract “after Easter”.

The 20-year-old striker has been in fine form for the Rossoneri this season, winning his first Italy call-up for the friendlies against Argentina and England.

That has inevitably led to rumours of interest from elsewhere, but the youngster is keen to stay at San Siro.

“We’ve started talking about it, but we haven’t got down to the details yet,” Donato Orgnoni explained, when asked by MilanNews about Cutrone’s contract.

“There won’t be any problems, we’ll find an agreement. We’ll see after Easter, we’ll sit down with the club and talk about it.

“The intention on our part, and on the part of the club, is to find an agreement with Milan.

“When a 20-year-old lad has these numbers it’s normal that he’ll be under the magnifying glass of a lot of clubs, but we’ve never caused problems.

“We’re at Milan, we’ll stay at Milan, and we won’t cause problems.”


幾個球員啲經理人一同肥佬對比真係差幾條街

Conti: 'Milan better under Gattuso'

Andrea Conti said Milan are fighting Inter and Lazio for a Champions League, then praised Coach Gennaro Gattuso compared to Vincenzo Montella.

The right-back has been out of action since suffering a knee injury in August, just a few weeks after making his move from Atalanta.

“I feel good, at long last, but I’m not at 100 per cent yet,” the 24-year-old said on Milan TV.

“I can play a few chunks of the game, but wouldn’t feel ready to start yet. The return to the locker room, the stadium, feeling the emotion of the match day was very important to me. I felt almost like it was my debut.”

Conti was brought in by Montella, but is now working under new boss Gattuso.

“Milan has changed a great deal, in the approach to the game and the characteristics of the team. It’s a totally different Milan and, to be honest, a better one.

“Gattuso is proving himself to be well-prepared and with all the experience he accumulated as a player, that was inevitable.

“Now I hope to be an extra weapon in the armoury for the final few weeks of the season. I believed in our Champions League chances even when there was a wider gap in the table. Considering the current situation, our rivals for a top four finish are Inter and Lazio.”

Agent: 'Conti back next season'

Andrea Conti’s agent reveals the Milan full-back “had moments of shock and panic” when he thought it was another ACL tear and his season is effectively over.

The former Atalanta man was on the verge of his comeback after anterior cruciate ligament surgery in September 2017 when he sprained the same knee in training.

“We had some moments of shock and panic. At first we thought it was the anterior cruciate ligament again, which would’ve just destroyed us. It would’ve been a huge blow,” agent Mario Giuffredi told Radio Rossonera.

“He is shaken still, as he was given a big scare. When eh found out there was no ligament damage, he recovered a little and has started work to get back in shape.

“There is so little left in the current campaign, he is thinking more about the next season. There’s just not enough time, you can’t rush the recovery process after three months to play three games.

“Andrea’s desire to return was so strong, but at times you need patience and to focus on the important things. It’ll be a shame missing the rest of the season, but he has four years on his contract with Milan and must look at the big picture.

“It’s a pity, as he played 60 minutes with the youth team a few days ago and said he expected to struggle more in that match. The time has come for him to realise that taking a month more to reach 100 per cent is what the fans want more than this desperation to return.”

Mirabelli: 'Suso must have Milan desire'

Milan director Massimiliano Mirabelli confirmed contract talks for Alessio Romagnoli, keeping Nikola Kalinic, but Suso “has to have the desire” to stay.

The director of sport spoke to multiple outlets, including Sky Sport Italia and Tuttomercatoweb.

“We want Alessio Romagnoli to remain for a long time and we are already talking to his agent. We trust all our players can accompany us for a long while yet.

“That also goes for Suso, as let’s not forget, we are talking about Milan here. All the players in the world would love to wear this jersey.

“We want to keep Suso, but he has to have the same desire. If Suso, or anyone else, no longer wanted to wear this jersey, it’d be only right to take an offer into consideration.”

Unlike many of the stars at San Siro, Suso is unusual in that his contract includes a release clause.

“That’s not up to us. I am generally against release clauses, but his agents made a very specific request and so we’re keeping it there. If he wants to go, then he can.”

Kalinic is also reported to be on the market, especially after he was dropped by Coach Gennaro Gattuso for showing a bad attitude in training.

“Nikola is an extraordinary lad and a quality striker,” explained Mirabelli.

“It’s true that he had a few difficulties so far, but Gattuso is his biggest admirer. Nothing happened, he just wants everyone to train to the max, otherwise he won’t call them up. I can guarantee Kalinic is one of the players Gattuso admires the most.”

Çalhanoğlu to Corriere della Sera: "After my goal against Chievo I kissed the Milan shirt, from now on I'll celebrate like that. I had never done it in Germany, neither with Hamburg nor with Leverkusen."

If I am ready to do it again on Saturday against Juventus? I hope so, my confidence is growing. I feel good, on and off the pitch. In recent months we played good games, but the important matches arrive now, Juve then Inter immediately. We have to win. It is not important if I score or not.

Why haven't I scored from a free-kick yet? It's also a matter of pressure. Punizione (Free-kick in Italian) is perhaps the first Italian word I learned. Everyone tells me 'Hakan score it, Hakan score it'.

I know my statistics, in Germany I scored 15 free-kick goals. The opponents tried to not commit any fouls otherwise I would score.

Does Juventus stadium scare? I have already played at Camp Nou and I think San Siro is more or less the same. In any case we have to play as a team, if we do we can beat them too.

Juventus is an important team with great forwards. We have to stay attentive to Higuain, Pjanic and Dybala.

With Gattuso we learned to play as a unit, why did it not happen before? We often asked ourselves. There were new players, new faces, new characters. It takes time to put them together and make them friends.

Milan better without Montella & vice versa? This is football, coaches come and go and everyone has his methods, his philosophy, his system of play. Maybe small things change and a player becomes better or worse.

He posted a message on Instagram announcing “this is the end of my adventure with PSG, but despite difficult moments, I am happy to have worn this jersey, will keep wonderful memories with my teammates. I will always love this club.”

Inter and Milan had already been linked with Ben Arfa, while Roma are also an option for this bargain buy.

Often accused of lacking discipline, he was frozen out by Coach Unai Emery and hasn’t made a single competitive appearance for the club this season.

Gattuso fed up of contract talk

Gennaro Gattuso insists enough is enough about his new Milan contract but admits ‘I could’ve done better’ with his handling of Andrea Conti.

The build-up to Milan’s clash with Juventus in Serie A on Saturday has been overshadowed by talk of Gattuso’s proposed extension and Conti possibly needing a second operation after more knee problems.

“We’ll be facing a great team and we can’t afford to make anymore mistakes if we want to qualify for the Champions League,” the Coach said at a Press conference.

“Returning players? I’ve seen them with good legs and great desire to play this game. We needed this break? Kalinic? He trained well and I don’t have a problem with him.

“Bonucci back in Turin? He’s calm, it’s normal if he’s a bit emotional, but he’s a great professional.

“Conti?" We managed him well, but maybe I could’ve done better. I was wrong to make him feel so comfortable.

“We’ll know if he needs more surgery in a few days, but we must be close to him because he’s important to this club.

“Allegri? He was my captain at Perugia and always respected me as a real player. I’ve never forgotten him.

“As a Coach, I have to thank him because he was right. We cleared the air, I apologised and we’ve had a great relationship for a while now.

“I envy him for his ability. When you study Juve, you don’t understand any of it. He’s changed a lot because he has great knowledge. He’s become a great Coach.

“My renewal? It’ll come, but I can’t talk about it anymore. Whether it’s in an Easter egg or not, it doesn’t matter, but please just let it […] pass, enough.”

米蘭1-3負祖雲達斯，加度素認為這個結果不能反映米蘭的場上表現，他還批評了查漢奴古，加度素：“我們的表現不錯，這感覺和我們在倫敦輸給阿仙奴時有點像。結果沒有反映比賽過程，我們必須繼續努力。”

“我對查漢奴古的表現很生氣，當他失掉球權，他就開始抗議，我不喜歡他這樣的表現。他低著頭踢球，開始吼隊友。如果他在失掉球權後，立即爬起來回搶，那我們就不會丟第二個球。米蘭整體表現不錯，但沒有贏球，所以我們需要繼續提高。”

週三米蘭還要迎來補賽的米蘭打吡，加度素說：“3個月之前，很多人都想不到我們能競爭歐聯席位，所以我們必須恢復體能，一場一場的準備比賽。我們有出色的球員，但我們在身體對抗方面無法和祖雲達斯競爭，這也決定了今天的結果。我對球隊的表現滿意，但我對於這個結果不滿意。未來沒人會記住你們場上的表現，只會記住這個比分。”

“這個比分讓我難過，我笑不出來，也無法假裝開心。我們都對這個結果很失望，如果我們對於這個結果不感到難過，那我們永遠不會成為冠軍。”

被問及為何讓安達施華正選，後來又用卡連歷而不是古圖尼換下了安達施華，加度素說：“我對安達施華的表現滿意，他很好的護住了球，雖然開場后犯了幾次錯誤，但他很有威脅。古圖尼參加了國家隊的比賽，所以我認為安達施華和卡連歷在場上更有威脅。”

“我對查漢奴古的表現很生氣，當他失掉球權，他就開始抗議，我不喜歡他這樣的表現。他低著頭踢球，開始吼隊友。如果他在失掉球權後，立即爬起來回搶，那我們就不會丟第二個球。米蘭整體表現不錯，但沒有贏球，所以我們需要繼續提高。”

週三米蘭還要迎來補賽的米蘭打吡，加度素說：“3個月之前，很多人都想不到我們能競爭歐聯席位，所以我們必須恢復體能，一場一場的準備比賽。我們有出色的球員，但我們在身體對抗方面無法和祖雲達斯競爭，這也決定了今天的結果。我對球隊的表現滿意，但我對於這個結果不滿意。未來沒人會記住你們場上的表現，只會記住這個比分。”

“這個比分讓我難過，我笑不出來，也無法假裝開心。我們都對這個結果很失望，如果我們對於這個結果不感到難過，那我們永遠不會成為冠軍。”
